home.no_recent_desc: Play a track to see it here. Your listening history builds as you discover new music.
home.tagline: Discover your favorite music and explore new sounds.

player.volume_dop_locked: Volume handled by the DAC in native DSD (DoP)

library.empty_desc: Import audio files or a folder to fill your library.
library.no_album_desc: Import audio files to automatically generate albums.
library.no_artist_desc: Import audio files to get started.
library.no_genre_desc: Genres will appear automatically from your audio files' tags.
library.no_track_artist: No track found for this artist.
library.no_album_artist: No album found for this artist.

playlist_page.empty_liked_desc: Tracks you like will appear here. Explore your library and like your favorite tracks.
playlist_page.empty_recent_desc: Tracks you listen to will appear here automatically.
playlist_page.empty_playlist_desc: Add tracks from your library to fill this playlist.

profil.select_desc: Select your profile to find your libraries and playlists
profil.create_desc: Create a profile to personalize your experience

settings.title: Settings
settings.autostart_desc: Launch RustMusic automatically at system startup
settings.tray_desc: Closing the window minimizes the app to the tray
settings.notifications_desc: Show a notification when the track changes
settings.audio_devices_desc: Detected capabilities of each DAC (sample rates, formats, channels).
settings.audio_devices_buffer_hint: Range allowed by the driver. Smaller buffers reduce latency but raise the risk of dropouts.
settings.audio_devices_probed_hint: Obtained by direct WASAPI probing — bit-perfect in exclusive mode.
settings.audio_devices_windows_mix_hint: What Windows sends to the DAC in shared mode (mixer active).
settings.audio_devices_no_exclusive_title: Exclusive mode refused by this device
settings.audio_devices_no_exclusive_hint: The driver rejected every probed combination. Showing declared capabilities.
settings.audio_quality_desc: Quality vs. CPU cost trade-off. Auto picks based on your machine.
settings.audio_quality_high_desc: Maximum quality — 2048-tap DSD filter, high-precision resampler.
settings.audio_quality_medium_desc: Balanced — 1024-tap DSD filter, audibly identical for most listeners.
settings.audio_quality_low_desc: Compatibility — 512-tap DSD filter, DSD output at 44.1 kHz. For VMs / older PCs.
settings.audio_quality_minimal_desc: Degraded mode — 256-tap DSD filter, 5s buffer, 44.1 kHz output. Use this only if playback stutters in Compatibility mode (noticeable audio quality reduction).
settings.render_mode_desc: GPU acceleration vs software rendering (Linux). Auto picks based on the host. App restart required to apply.
settings.render_mode_vm_detected: Virtual machine detected ({kind}) — Automatic forces software rendering for stability.
settings.render_mode_restart_required: Restart RustMusic to apply this change.
settings.hardware_desc: Use GPU for audio decoding if available
settings.dlna_enabled_desc: Share your music on the local network (amplifiers, AVRs, Sonos…)
settings.dlna_friendly_name_desc: Name shown in the DLNA server list on devices
settings.rescan_library_desc: Re-scan all folders and import new files
settings.open_data_folder_desc: Open the folder containing the database and covers
settings.reset_desc: Delete all data and return to initial state
settings.network_desc: DLNA server and local network sharing
settings.single_click_play_desc: A single click on a track starts playback instead of selecting it
settings.show_sleep_timer_desc: Show the sleep-timer button in the top bar
settings.system_media_controls_desc: Show the playing track in the OS (Windows mini-player, lock screen, keyboard media keys). Disable if you hit issues on your platform.
settings.window_controls_style_desc: Choose between macOS or Windows style buttons
settings.window_controls_position_desc: Left or right side of the title bar
settings.wasapi_exclusive_on_hint: Active — WASAPI exclusive bypasses the Windows mixer
settings.wasapi_exclusive_off_hint: Inactive — audio via the Windows shared mixer
settings.wasapi_exclusive_desc: Bypass the Windows mixer to send audio directly to your DAC with no resampling and no system effects. Bit-perfect output in the file native format.
settings.wasapi_exclusive_warning: In exclusive mode, RustMusic takes full ownership of the audio device: no other application (browser, game, system notifications) will be able to play sound while a track is playing.
settings.dsd_dop_desc: Send your DSD files to the DAC without PCM conversion
settings.dsd_dop_warning: DSD is sent as-is to the DAC (DoP), which decodes it natively. Software volume is disabled (bit-perfect): set the volume on your amp/DAC. If the DAC rejects the format, it automatically falls back to PCM conversion.

about.title: About
about.credits_text: Designed and developed with passion. Built with open source technologies.
about.icons_credits: Icons by Lucide, Phosphor, Mynaui and Iconify.

pipeline.dop_desc: The DSD stream is sent as-is to the DAC (DoP), which decodes it natively — no PCM conversion.
pipeline.dop_transport_hint: DoP encapsulation: the DAC shows "DSD" and decodes the original 1-bit stream.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.intro_desc: Spotted a bug, have an improvement idea, or just want to share feedback? We read every message and take your suggestions into account.
feedback.email_desc: Bug, suggestion or question — we read every message

updater.available_desc: A new version of RustMusic is ready to install.

common.title: title
common.no_imported_folder_desc: Import a folder from the action bar to explore it here.
